html_content:

Sunday service 9:30 AM. Men's choir rehearsal 9:00 AM on the 1st and 3rd Sundays. This week's announcements and prayer list are below.

Season Opener

Hi {{first_name}}, the Crestwood track season opener is February 13. Practices run Monday through Friday, 3:00 to 5:30 PM. Let's have a great season. - Coach Perry
